title: Human Health and Body Systems
unitGoal: Students will learn how major body systems work together and how wise habits support health, safety, and care for the body.

lessons.title: Body Systems Work Together
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on how organs and body systems have different jobs but work together as one body.

lessons.title: Digestion and Nutrients
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on the digestive system, nutrients, energy, and healthy food choices.

lessons.title: Breathing, Blood, and the Heart
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on the respiratory and circulatory systems and how oxygen moves through the body.

lessons.title: Bones, Muscles, and Nerves
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on the skeletal, muscular, and nervous systems and how the body moves and responds.

lessons.title: Healthy Habits and Body Care
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on sleep, movement, nutrition, hygiene, and caring for the body without asking private health details.

lessons.title: Prevention and Wise Choices
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set on safety, illness prevention, asking trusted adults for help, and making wise choices.

lessons.title: Body Systems Case Studies
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned student activity set using simple scenarios to reason about how body systems interact.

lessons.title: Unit 2 Final Quiz
lessons.teacherOverview: Planned final quiz on body systems, system interactions, healthy habits, and age-appropriate health choices.
